ruk.title: Management — JSC ROSATOM ENERGOKHIMTEKHNOLOGII
ruk.top.label: Top Management
ruk.top.title: Senior Leadership
ruk.top.sub: The company is led by a team of experienced professionals with long-term experience in the nuclear industry and related sectors.
ruk.ceo.name: Zavarykin Konstantin Vladimirovich
ruk.dir1.name: Merkulova Svetlana Georgievna
ruk.dir2.name: Berezin Fedor Nikolaevich
ruk.dir3.name: Steklov Andrei Stanislavovich
ruk.dir4.name: Chumachenko Vitaliy Valerievich
ruk.dir5.name: Makarov Anton Nikolaevich
ruk.ceo.bio1: Konstantin Vladimirovich has led the company since 2024. Under his leadership, the enterprise continues to develop key business lines — sorbent production, power system modeling and comprehensive engineering.
ruk.ceo.bio2: An experienced leader with extensive experience in the nuclear industry, he ensures the strategic development of the enterprise and strengthening its positions in Russian and international markets.
ruk.ceo.edu2: PhD in Technical Sciences (2001, FEI, Obninsk)
ruk.ceo.edu3: Honored Worker of the Nuclear Industry of the Russian Federation
ruk.dir1.pos: Deputy General Director for Corporate Functions
ruk.dir1.bio:
Oversees administrative and corporate functions of the company. Ensures interdepartmental coordination, document management and compliance with corporate standards.
merkulova-sg@raecht.ru
ruk.dir2.pos: Deputy General Director for Engineering & Energy Services
ruk.dir2.bio:
Leads the engineering and energy services division. Manages projects in design, equipment supply and implementation of energy facilities.
berezin-fn@raecht.ru
ruk.dir3.pos: Head of Water Treatment Project Office
ruk.dir3.bio:
Responsible for developing the water treatment and purification division. Manages projects for process scheme development, pre-design surveys and water treatment system supply.
steklov-as@raecht.ru
ruk.dir4.pos: Deputy General Director for Power System Modeling
ruk.dir4.bio:
Leads the power system modeling and calculations division. PhD in Technical Sciences, specialist in electrical mode calculations, stability analysis, power output and external power supply scheme design.
chumachenko-vv@raecht.ru
ruk.dir5.bio:
Production branch of JSC Rosatom Energokhimtekhnologii. Manages branch engineering projects, ensures interaction with customers and partners.
man@termoxid.com

ruk.dirs.title: Directors of Business Lines
ruk.values.label: Values
ruk.values.title: Management Principles
ruk.val1.title: Responsibility
ruk.val1.desc: We take full responsibility for the quality of products and services to customers and society.
ruk.val2.title: Innovation
ruk.val2.desc: Continuous improvement of technologies and development of new solutions is the foundation of our growth.
ruk.val3.title: Partnership
ruk.val3.desc: Long-term partnerships with clients based on trust and mutual benefit.
ruk.cta.title: Write to Management
ruk.cta.desc: You can send an inquiry or proposal directly to company management.
